name: Strait of Hormuz — Full Closure
description: Full closure of the Strait of Hormuz. All crude flows that pass through Hormuz are reduced to zero. Alternative routing via Yanbu is partially available for Saudi Arabia only.

name: Strait of Hormuz — 50% Disruption
description: Significant tension in the Strait of Hormuz reduces throughput capacity to 50% of normal. Shipping costs increase by 80%.

name: Russia — Full Export Embargo
description: Comprehensive sanctions reduce Russian crude exports to 20% of normal volumes. Significant rerouting pressure on remaining global suppliers.

name: Bab el-Mandeb — Red Sea Crisis
description: Sustained Houthi attacks reduce Red Sea shipping capacity to 40% of normal. Vessels divert around Cape of Good Hope, adding 10-15 days and significantly raising costs.

name: Saudi Arabia — 40% Production Cut
description: Saudi Arabia announces a unilateral 40% cut in crude oil production and exports. Major supply shock for all Saudi importers.
